sections.heading: 1. Information We Collect
sections.content:
When you sign in with Google, we collect the following information:
- Display name
- Email address
- Profile photo URL

This information is used solely for game services such as ranking and account management.

sections.heading: 2. How We Use Your Information
sections.content:
Your information is used for:
- Displaying your name and profile on the ranking board
- Managing your game account
- Tracking your game scores and achievements

sections.heading: 3. Data Storage
sections.content: Your data is stored securely using Google Firebase services. Game scores and account information are retained until you delete your account.

sections.heading: 4. Account Deletion
sections.content: You can delete your account at any time through Settings > DELETE ACCOUNT. This will permanently remove all your data including game scores and ranking records.

sections.heading: 5. Third-Party Services
sections.content: This game uses Google Firebase for authentication and data storage. By using this service, you also agree to Google's Terms of Service and Privacy Policy.

sections.heading: 6. Changes to Terms
sections.content: We may update these terms from time to time. If significant changes are made, you will be asked to agree to the updated terms upon your next login.
